name: EC2 Instance Public Ports Restricted
description: Ensures EC2 instances do not expose sensitive ports (SSH, RDP, databases) to the public internet
remediation: Restrict security group rules to allow access only from specific IP ranges or through a bastion host/VPN. Remove 0.0.0.0/0 CIDR blocks for sensitive ports.
remediation_steps: Identify EC2 instances with public IPs and open sensitive ports
Review security groups attached to these instances
Remove or restrict inbound rules allowing 0.0.0.0/0 for ports 22, 3389, 3306, 5432
Implement bastion hosts or VPN for administrative access
Use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager for SSH-less access
